weekly_template.name: AI Recommended — Connor Chicoli — Power — 2026-07-01
weekly_template.description: AI-generated weekly program. Focus: Power. Source: ai_layer.recommended_programs id=124.

activity_templates.name: Prep — Connor Chicoli
activity_templates.description: Connor's prep block prioritizes addressing his T-spine mobility and left hip internal rotation deficits, alongside building foundational stability and power needed for his focus. The selection includes general warmup, targeted mobility, core and glute activation, CNS prep, and movement enhancement drills to prime him for the session.

exercises.exercise_name: Cradle Walk to Lateral Lunge w/ Arms OH
exercises.matched_exercise_name: Cradle Walk to Lateral Lunge w/ Arms OH
exercises.notes: This dynamic exercise helps raise body temperature and promotes multi-planar hip mobility and trunk rotation, preparing the body for movement.

exercises.exercise_name: Pull Back Butt Kick to Walking Spiderman w/ Hip Lift and Reach
exercises.matched_exercise_name: Pull Back Butt Kick to Walking Spiderman w/ Hip Lift and Reach
exercises.notes: A comprehensive dynamic movement that stretches hip flexors and activates glutes and hamstrings, enhancing overall hip mobility.

exercises.exercise_name: All Fours Band T Spine Rotation
exercises.matched_exercise_name: All Fours Band T Spine Rotation
exercises.notes: Directly targets the bilateral T-spine mobility deficits, improving thoracic rotation and extension crucial for overhead mechanics.
This exercise improves hip internal and external rotation, specifically addressing the left prone hip IR deficit and overall hip joint health.
A comprehensive mobility drill that enhances both hip and thoracic spine rotation, supporting the overall mobility goals for the T-spine and hips.

exercises.exercise_name: Single Leg Hip Thrust Off Wall
exercises.matched_exercise_name: Single Leg Hip Thrust Off Wall
exercises.notes: Activates the glutes unilaterally and improves hip extension, which is fundamental for power development and addressing bilateral power deficits.
Engages the scapular stabilizers and improves overhead shoulder mobility and control, essential for robust movement patterns.
Targets activation of the hip flexors, which are critical for dynamic leg drive and efficient movement during athletic tasks.

exercises.exercise_name: 90/90 Hip Lift w/ Right Arm Reach
exercises.matched_exercise_name: 90/90 Hip Lift w/ Right Arm Reach
exercises.notes: Integrates core stability with hip dissociation and reach, preparing the nervous system for coordinated full-body movements required in a power session.
Primes the athlete for unilateral power and rotational demands, directly addressing the need for explosive movement in a power-focused session.
Focuses on sequencing hip rotation into a powerful throwing pattern, crucial for athletes needing to develop rotational power and speed.
Enhances core stability and control under unpredictable loads, bridging the gap from controlled movements to dynamic, reactive power output.

activity_templates.name: Bulletproofing — Connor Chicoli
activity_templates.description: Connor exhibits deficits in T-spine mobility and trunk flexion during pitching, which can impact throwing arm health and mechanics. This bulletproofing block prioritizes general arm-care staples for shoulder and elbow health, augmented with specific mobility and stability work to address his thoracic spine and improve trunk control.

exercises.notes: Decompresses the shoulder and improves overhead stability, which is fundamental for throwing athletes.
Improves internal rotation range of motion, crucial for arm health and preventing impingement in pitchers.
Actively enhances internal rotation control and strength through end-range eccentric loading, building on passive stretch.
Activates the mid and lower trapezius for improved scapular stability and posture, supporting the throwing motion.
Addresses T-spine mobility deficits and enhances hip mobility, creating a better foundation for scapular movement and trunk rotation.
Improves pelvic control and thoracic rotation, with the reach component engaging the serratus anterior to support scapular stability and trunk mechanics.

activity_templates.name: Plyo — Connor Chicoli
activity_templates.description: This three-day plyo cycle for Connor Chicoli primarily targets his deficits in total trunk flexion, trunk flexion at release, and D2 extension velocity and acceleration. The sessions aim to improve rotational power and lead leg force production. As Connor is a starter in the Velocity Phase with Saturday games, the weekly layout adheres to the in-season cadence with a P0 for recovery, P1 for moderate intent and skill refinement, and a P2 for maximum intent and direct deficit correction, while ensuring game day is a light plyo day (P1) as the game itself is the high-intensity event. The cycle builds intensity from recovery to max effort, strategically addressing his biomechanical gaps.

sessions.label: Recovery day
sessions.session_intent: Focus on tissue restoration and re-establishing foundational movement patterns with low intensity. This session aims to gently prime the hip and trunk for rotation while promoting feel and connection.

drills.notes: This drill primes the kinetic chain and emphasizes controlled deceleration and internal rotation, assisting in tissue recovery and setting a foundational feel for trunk rotation.
Facilitates gentle hip and trunk rotation, helping to restore range of motion and feel for sequential movement after an outing without high-impact stress.
Promotes core engagement and controlled trunk rotation, enhancing stability and preparing the musculature for more dynamic movements without excessive force.
Focuses on arm path and connection, promoting a feeling of an efficient and low-stress throwing motion crucial for recovery days.
Continues to reinforce a clean arm path and efficient trunk rotation with light ball weight, ensuring proper mechanics are grooved during recovery.

sessions.label: Hybrid day
sessions.session_intent: This session builds on recovery by introducing moderate intent, focusing on dynamic hip drive, lead leg engagement, and rhythmic trunk rotation to prepare for higher intensity work.

drills.notes: Serves as a dynamic primer, increasing connection and rotational awareness with a heavier ball before introducing more explosive movements.
Engages the hips and trunk in a rotational pattern, building moderate power and improving feel for efficient energy transfer during the throwing motion.
Reinforces controlled yet powerful trunk rotation and core stability, essential for Connor's trunk flexion deficits.
Introduces dynamic trunk rotation and rhythm, helping to develop the D2 extension velocity that Connor lacks, emphasizing a smooth, powerful acceleration.
Focuses on lead leg engagement and ground force production, directly addressing Connor's deficit in lead leg peak vertical force by cueing a strong block.
Promotes dynamic balance and a strong lead leg drive, linking lower half mechanics to efficient trunk rotation for better D2 extension.

sessions.label: Work day
sessions.session_intent: This is a maximal intent session designed to aggressively target Connor's trunk flexion and D2 extension deficits, emphasizing powerful rotational acceleration and a strong lead leg block for full expression.

drills.notes: This powerful priming drill initiates the kinetic chain with high intent, loading the body for maximal rotational output in subsequent drills.
Emphasizes powerful hip and trunk rotation with a heavier ball, directly addressing D2 extension power and building strength through the core.
Promotes dynamic hip drive and powerful trunk rotation, specifically targeting Connor's D2 extension velocity and contributing to greater trunk flexion.
Drives maximal velocity in trunk rotation, directly training the D2 extension deficits by encouraging explosive, rhythmic acceleration through the torso.
Utilizes an underload ball to achieve supramaximal intent and over-speed training for trunk rotation, further enhancing D2 extension velocity and acceleration.
Focuses on an aggressive lead leg block and maximal vertical force production, crucial for translating rotational energy into throwing velocity and improving his lead leg deficit.
Encourages full-body intent and emphasizes trunk flexion at release, directly addressing Connor's deficits in total trunk flexion and trunk flexion at release.
